channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.8%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live
item.description: Streeting resigns as health secretary but stops short of launching leadership bid - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown
item.description: Streeting has heralded the end of the Starmer premiership – but he’s unlikely to win the crown

item.title: BBC Politics: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC
item.description: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC

item.title: ITVX: In full: Wes Streeting's resignation letter to PM | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: In full: Wes Streeting's resignation letter to PM | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: BBC Politics: How would a Labour leadership contest work?
item.description: How would a Labour leadership contest work?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race
item.description: Starmer latest: Streeting’s scathing resignation letter to PM fires starting gun on leadership race

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: No one else is at Changi airport is talking about the Streeting resignation. Disappointing.
item.description: No one else is at Changi airport is talking about the Streeting resignation. Disappointing.

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
